headline: Pinnacle West (PNW) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: On resource procurement, we recently received proposals in response to the all-source RFP issued later last year, which targeted new resources beginning service between 2029 and 2031.  In summary, we are executing our plan, delivering operational excellence to our customers, investing in grid expansion to serve Arizona’s rapid growth, and improving investment recovery to reduce regulatory lag while ensuring affordability for customers.

headline: Pinnacle West Swings to Profit in Q1 as Historic Heat Drives Power Demand (NYSE:PNW)
summary: Pinnacle West swung to a Q1 profit, beating estimates on $1.15B revenue, driven by record Arizona heat and higher power demand. The stock dipped 2% in pre-market despite strong results.
